productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Printed Black Tshirts
description: Composition Black T-shirt made of 50% polyester and 50% cotton, has a ribbed crew neckline, short sleeves and graphic lettering on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on print/embroidery Dark grey graphic lettering on a black base T-shirt from mark taylor makes for a great casual wear. The words form the numeral one, while the word "Success" stands out to get your attention. Pair it with jeans and canvas shoes.
